items.title: 2006-2011 Mercedes M272 3.5L V6 Engine 272.970 Tested OEM C-Class E-Class
items.description:
Mercedes-Benz M272 3.5L V6 Engine Assembly

Complete tested engine removed from a 2008 C350. Includes all internal components, sensors, and accessories as shown. Engine code M272.970.

Details

  • OEM Part Number: 272.970
  • Engine Type: 3.5L V6 (M272)
  • Condition: Used - Removed from running vehicle. Inspected and tested.

Compatibility

Fits 2006-2011 Mercedes-Benz models with M272 3.5L V6 engine:

  • 2008-2011 C-Class (W204) C300, C350
  • 2006-2009 E-Class (W211) E350
  • 2006-2009 CLK-Class (A209) CLK350
  • 2006-2009 SLK-Class (R171) SLK350
  • 2006-2009 R-Class (W251) R350
  • 2006-2009 ML-Class (W164) ML350

Technical Notes

Requires ECU from donor vehicle or reprogramming. Verify transmission compatibility (722.6 or 722.9). Includes all accessories shown.
items.technicalNotes: Requires ECU from donor vehicle or reprogramming. Verify transmission compatibility (722.6 or 722.9).

items.title: 2008-2014 Mercedes C-Class W204 Front Right Window Regulator A2047200679 OEM

Compatibility

Direct bolt-on replacement. May require window motor initialization procedure after installation.

items.title: 2008-2014 Mercedes C-Class W204 Front Right Door Panel A20472095628N28 OEM
items.description:
Mercedes-Benz Front Right Door Panel

OEM door panel removed from a 2008 C350 AMG/Sport. Part number A20472095628N28. Includes all mounting clips and hardware as shown.

Details

  • OEM Part Number: A 204 720 95 62 8N28
  • Position: Front Right (Passenger Side)
  • Color Code: 8N28 (Black)
  • Condition: Used - Removed from vehicle. Normal wear.

Compatibility

Fits 2008-2014 Mercedes-Benz W204 models with Sport/AMG interior:

  • 2008-2014 C-Class Sedan (W204) with Sport Package
  • 2008-2014 C-Class Coupe (C204) with Sport Package
  • 2008-2014 C-Class Wagon (S204) with Sport Package
  • Includes C300, C350, C63 AMG with Sport interior

Technical Notes

Verify interior color match (8N28 = Black). Includes all mounting points and hardware pockets.
items.technicalNotes: Verify interior color match (8N28 = Black). Sport/AMG trim only.
